seoDescription: Discover Palm & Light Coffee through a calm, hospitality-led story of place, rhythm, and connection.

hero.headline: More than a café.
hero.body: A space shaped by light, coffee, and the people who return to it every day.

intro.headline: A place to return to.
intro.body1: Palm & Light was created as a place to slow down.
intro.body2: A place where mornings feel intentional, afternoons feel open, and every visit feels familiar.

people.headline: Built by people who care how a place feels.
people.body1: We’re a small team, rooted in the South Bay, who believe that great coffee is only part of the experience.
people.body2: It’s the light through the windows, the rhythm of the space, and the feeling of being welcomed back.

items.title: Light
items.body: Spaces designed to feel open, calm, and sun-filled.

items.title: Connection
items.body: A place people return to, again and again.

feature.headline: Part of your day.
feature.body1: Morning coffee. Midday reset. A place to meet, work, or pause.
feature.body2: Palm & Light becomes part of the rhythm.
